markdown:
Hārakasuras appear as two figures that are intrinsically intertwined, moving in complete tandem. In truth, they're a single being with a split heart and split wills, switching between virtue and god-defying ruin. Hārakasuras are above all beings of kindness and charity, yet every kind deed they seek to do only emphasizes the broken nature of the world—for if all were given what they needed, charity would never be required. Hārakasuras thus dub themselves as thieves and plunderers, stealing from one corner of the world to give to another, torn between their loyalty toward helping people and their despair at a horrific existence where people cannot survive without their help. **[Recall Knowledge - Spirit](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44)): DC 23 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 21 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18 [Hārakasura](/Monsters.aspx?ID=4086) **Source** [Monster Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=276) pg. 43 **Perception** +15; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Diabolic](/Languages.aspx?ID=117); [telepathy](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=79) 30 feet **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +15, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +19, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +15, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) +15, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=46) +15, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +15 **Str** +6 **Dex** +4 **Con** +4 **Int** +2 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +4 **Items** [Kukri](/Weapons.aspx?ID=56) (4) --- **AC** 25 [all-around vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=49) **Fort** +15 **Ref** +17 **Will** +13 **HP** 130 **Immunities** [curses](/Traits.aspx?ID=566) **Weaknesses** [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) 5 (see glorious visage) **Dual Mind** **Trigger** The hārakasura fails a saving throw against a [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647) effect **Effect** The hārakasura shunts the effect into one of their minds, rendering them temporarily insensible. They change their result to a success, but one of their bodies hangs limply until the end of their next turn. During this time, the hārakasura is [clumsy 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=61); takes a –10-foot circumstance penalty to their Speed; and can't use Dual Mind, Dance of Destruction, or Reactive Strike.
**Reactive Strike** The hārakasura gains an additional reaction at the beginning of each of their turns that they can use only for a Reactive Strike. --- **Speed** 40 feet **Melee** kukri +18 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 1d6+9 slashing plus 2d6 [persistent bleed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and 1d4 spirit **Melee** claw +18 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 1d6+9 slashing and 1d4 spirit **Dance of Destruction** **Requirements** The hārakasura's last action was a Strike that dealt damage; **Effect** The hārakasura Strides up to 10 feet and Strikes. **Glorious Visage** The asura sanctifies themselves as either [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) or [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521), gaining the trait corresponding to their choice and losing the opposing trait; their strikes, spells, and abilities also gain the trait corresponding to their choice. The asura also gains weakness 5 to the opposing sanctification and loses any weakness to its chosen sanctification. The choice is permanent until the asura uses this ability to change their sanctification. **Wound Thief** ([Divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=579)) The hārakasura touches an adjacent creature that is taking [persistent bleed damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29). If the hārakasura has the [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) trait, it ends the persistent bleed effect immediately and restores 2d6 Hit Points to the target; this is a [healing](/Traits.aspx?ID=623) and [vitality](/Traits.aspx?ID=509) effect. If the hārakasura has the [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521) trait, it causes the target to immediately take damage equal to its persistent bleed value, and the hārakasura gains [temporary Hit Points](/Rules.aspx?ID=2321) equal to the damage taken until the start of its next turn.
name: Hārakasura

markdown:
Garadasuras are massive ophidian spirits who hold to duties of guardianship and butchery. Many are former [naga](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=446) who have given up on their role of stewards of reality and instead turned their efforts to reversing the act of creation. Garadasuras often continue the duties they had as naga but can also turn destructive, rampaging with the force of an entire poisonous legion. **[Recall Knowledge - Spirit](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44)): DC 28 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 26 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 23 [Garadasura](/Monsters.aspx?ID=4087) **Source** [Monster Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=276) pg. 44 **Perception** +21; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Diabolic](/Languages.aspx?ID=117); [telepathy](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=79) 60 feet **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +21, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +23, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +21, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) +21, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=46) +21, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +23 **Str** +6 **Dex** +3 **Con** +6 **Int** +0 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +4 **Items** _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [scimitar](/Weapons.aspx?ID=393)_ (2), [Breastplate](/Armor.aspx?ID=10) --- **AC** 30 **Fort** +24 **Ref** +20 **Will** +19 **HP** 200 ([fast healing 5](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=62)) **Immunities** [curses](/Traits.aspx?ID=566), [disease](/Traits.aspx?ID=578), [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) **Weaknesses** [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) 10 **Encircling Aura** ([aura](/Traits.aspx?ID=542), [divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=579), [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) 50 feet. A garadasura exudes a 50-foot aura whenever it remains motionless for at least 1 round. If the garadasura has the [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) trait, all allied creatures within the area gain a +1 status bonus to AC and saving throws. If the garadasura has the [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521) trait, all unallied creatures that enter this area must succeed at a DC 30 Will save or spend their next action to move toward the garadasura's location. If the garadasura moves, the effect ends for all currently affected creatures.
**[Reactive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=48)** --- **Speed** 40 feet, swim 30 feet **Melee** _scimitar_ +24 ([Forceful](/Traits.aspx?ID=611), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=708), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 2d6+9 slashing plus 2d6 [persistent poison](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and 1d6 spirit **Melee** fangs +24 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 2d6+9 piercing plus butchering venom and 1d6 spirit **Melee** tail +24 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 2d6+9 bludgeoning plus 1d6 spirit and [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=45) **Ranged** venom spit +28 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [range 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 2d6+6 poison plus butchering venom **Butchering Venom** ([Incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=631), [Poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669)) **Saving Throw** DC 30 Fortitude; **Maximum Duration** 6 rounds; **Stage 1** 3d6 poison damage and [slowed 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=92) (1 round); **Stage 2** 4d6 poison damage and slowed 2 (1 round); **Stage 3** 6d6 damage and [paralyzed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=85) for 1 hour **[Constrict](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=57)** 2d6+7 bludgeoning, DC 30 **Glorious Visage** The asura sanctifies themselves as either [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) or [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521), gaining the trait corresponding to their choice and losing the opposing trait; their strikes, spells, and abilities also gain the trait corresponding to their choice. The asura also gains weakness 10 to the opposing sanctification and loses any weakness to its chosen sanctification. The choice is permanent until the asura uses this ability to change their sanctification. **Slither** The garadasura [Strides](/Actions.aspx?ID=2305) or [Swims](/Actions.aspx?ID=2381) up to half its Speed, pulling any creatures it has [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=77) with it. **[Swallow Whole](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=77)** ([Attack](/Traits.aspx?ID=540)) Large, 2d10+9 bludgeoning, Rupture 30;
name: Garadasura

Asura who have been forcibly reincarnated across countless lifetimes, bikkhasuras have grown to nearly godlike levels of power. **[Recall Knowledge - Spirit](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44)): DC 40 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 38 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 35 [Bikkhasura](/Monsters.aspx?ID=4088) **Source** [Monster Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=276) pg. 44 **Perception** +36; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59), [scent](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=74) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=412)) 60 feet, [_truesight_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1727) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Diabolic](/Languages.aspx?ID=117); [telepathy](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=79) 100 feet, [_truespeech_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1728) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +33, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +38, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +36, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +34, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) +34, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=46) +35, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +33 **Str** +10 **Dex** +7 **Con** +10 **Int** +7 **Wis** +7 **Cha** +8 --- **AC** 44 [all-around vision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=49) **Fort** +35 **Ref** +32 **Will** +32 +2 status to all **HP** 380 , regeneration 20 (deactivated by [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517)) **Immunities** [curses](/Traits.aspx?ID=566), [disease](/Traits.aspx?ID=578), [illusions](/Traits.aspx?ID=629), [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669), [polymorph](/Traits.aspx?ID=670) **Weaknesses** [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) 15 **Inescapable Aura** ([aura](/Traits.aspx?ID=542), [divine](/Traits.aspx?ID=579)) 30 feet. Creatures cannot [teleport](/Traits.aspx?ID=710) into or out of the bikkhasura's aura. Creatures attempting to teleport into the aura instead teleport to the nearest edge of the aura. Any attempts to teleport out of the aura are automatically disrupted.
**[Reactive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=48)** The bikkhasura gains 5 additional reactions at the beginning of each of their turns that they can use only for a Reactive Strike. --- **Speed** 40 feet, climb 40 feet, fly 40 feet, swim 40 feet **Melee** _spirit blade_ +37 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521), [versatile P](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 4d6+15 slashing and 4d6 spirit **Melee** jaws +37 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 4d10+15 piercing plus 4d6 [persistent poison](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and [Improved Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=66) **Melee** claw +35 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521)), **Damage** 4d8+15 slashing plus curse of wisdom and 1d6 spirit **Divine Innate Spells** DC 44 - **5th** [Planar Tether](/Spells.aspx?ID=1636), [Translocate](/Spells.aspx?ID=1724) (at will), [Wave of Despair](/Spells.aspx?ID=1757) (at will) - **8th** [Cursed Metamorphosis](/Spells.aspx?ID=1479), [Dispel Magic](/Spells.aspx?ID=1493) (×3), [Unfettered Movement](/Spells.aspx?ID=1732) (×3), [Weapon Storm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1758) - **9th** [Harm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1552), [Heal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554), [Implosion](/Spells.aspx?ID=1572), [Metamorphosis](/Spells.aspx?ID=1599), [Wails of the Damned](/Spells.aspx?ID=1747) - **10th** [Freeze Time](/Spells.aspx?ID=1538) - **Constant (10th)** [Truesight](/Spells.aspx?ID=1727) **Bladestorm** **Requirements** The bikkhasura is holding six spirit blades; **Effect** The bikkhasura makes up to six spirit blade Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the bikkhasura's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks. **Curse of Wisdom** ([Curse](/Traits.aspx?ID=566)) **Saving Throw** DC 42 Will; **Stage 1** 12d6 mental damage and target cannot use reactions (1 round); **Stage 2** 14d6 mental damage and the target is [slowed 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=92) (1 round); **Stage 3** 15d6 mental damage and target is [paralyzed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=85) (1 round) **Direct Spirit Blades** **Requirements** The bikkhasura has their spirit blades; **Effect** The bikkhasura directs one of its spirit blades to attack a target up to a distance of 50 feet away. Once a bikkhasura directs a spirit blade to attack a foe, the blade continues to make a single attack against that foe each round on the bikkhasura's turn until directed otherwise by the bikkhasura and as long as the foe remains within 50 feet of the bikkhasura. These weapons attack using the same statistics as the bikkhasura's spirit blade Strike and use the bikkhasura's multiple attack penalty. Any blades that are not within 50 feet of the bikkhasura at the end of its turn vanish. **Glorious Visage** The asura sanctifies themselves as either [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) or [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521), gaining the trait corresponding to their choice and losing the opposing trait; their strikes, spells, and abilities also gain the trait corresponding to their choice. The asura also gains weakness 15 to the opposing sanctification and loses any weakness to its chosen sanctification. The choice is permanent until the asura uses this ability to change their sanctification. **Horrific Glimpse** **Frequency** once per round; **Trigger** The bikkhasura uses Glorious Visage; **Effect** The bikkhasura explodes with spiritual energy, dealing 9d6 spirit damage to all creatures within 30 feet. This ability has the [holy](/Traits.aspx?ID=517) trait if the bikkhasura has the holy trait and the [unholy](/Traits.aspx?ID=521) trait when the bikkhasura has the unholy trait. **Spirit Blades** **Frequency** once per hour; **Effect** The bikkhasura summons six blades made out of spiritual energy. The blades either appear in the bikkhasura's hands or float next to the bikkhasura until the asura directs one or spends an Interact action to grab it. The spirit blades can be dispelled with a successful [counteract](/Rules.aspx?ID=371) check (counteract rank 10, counteract DC 42). A successful counteract dispels all blades, even if some have been directed away from the bikkhasura.
name: Bikkhasura

markdown:
Very rarely, when [sinspawn](/Monsters.aspx?ID=3192) sacrifice sentient beings to _runewells_, instead of sinspawn, an altogether different sort of aberration is created. Atrixyls are insectile humanoid warriors, whose powers are similar to yet stronger than ordinary sinspawn, and who are dedicated to destroying _runewells_ and similar fleshwarping artifacts. Some atrixyls seek to destroy _runewells_ due to an imprinting of pain and suffering that occurs during their creation, seeking to prevent future suffering from _runewells_. Others seek to break a _runewell_ and tap into its magical energies to gain personal power. This relentless mission has earned them the epithet “runebreakers,” and brings them into conflict with the sinspawn whose existences depend upon these runewells. Atrixyls traverse Golarion's ruined wastelands in search of both ancient _runewells_ and more contemporary fleshwarping facilities **[Recall Knowledge - Aberration](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44)): DC 33 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 31 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 28 [Atrixyl](/Monsters.aspx?ID=4089) **Source** [Monster Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=276) pg. 46 **Perception** +22; [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=59); true sin scent (precise) 60 feet **Languages** [Aklo](/Languages.aspx?ID=13), [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Draconic](/Languages.aspx?ID=2), [Elven](/Languages.aspx?ID=4), [Sakvroth](/Languages.aspx?ID=118), [Thassilonian](/Languages.aspx?ID=52) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +22, [Arcana](/Skills.aspx?ID=35) +20, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +22, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) +18, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +18, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +20, [Occultism](/Skills.aspx?ID=44) +20, [Sinspawn Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +20, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +22, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +16, [Thassilon Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +20 **Str** +7 **Dex** +5 **Con** +4 **Int** +3 **Wis** +1 **Cha** +3 **True Sin Scent** An atrixyl can smell creatures that reflect or generally revel in any of the seven sins as defined by the ancient empire of Thassilon (envy, gluttony, greed, lust, pride, sloth, and wrath) within 60 feet as a precise sense and can also distinguish between different sins and creatures. These typically include sinspawn and certain [demons](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=387), though the GM ultimately determines which creatures are appropriately sinful. --- **AC** 31 **Fort** +24 **Ref** +21 **Will** +18 +1 status to saves vs. [magic](/Traits.aspx?ID=644) **HP** 190 **Immunities** [controlled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=64) **Resistances** [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647) 10 **Weaknesses** [acid](/Traits.aspx?ID=524) 10 **[Reactive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=48)**
**Spell Break** **Trigger** The atrixyl critically succeeds on a saving throw; **Effect** The atrixyl shatters the portion of magic that would affect them and uses it to empower themself. The atrixyl gains temporary Hit Points equal to twice the triggering spell's rank and a +4 status bonus to damage rolls for 1 round. --- **Speed** 30 feet, climb 30 feet **Melee** fist +23 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644)), **Damage** 2d12+10 bludgeoning plus [Improved Push](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=66) **Absorb Sin** **Trigger** The atrixyl reduces a creature it can smell with its true sin scent to 0 Hit Points; **Effect** The atrixyl regains 6d6 Hit Points. **[Change Shape](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=55)** ([Arcane](/Traits.aspx?ID=534), [Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [Polymorph](/Traits.aspx?ID=670)) The atrixyl takes on the appearance of any Medium [humanoid](/Traits.aspx?ID=628). This doesn't change the atrixyl's Speed or their attack and damage modifiers with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal. **Insectile Agility** When the atrixyl [Leaps](/Actions.aspx?ID=2298), [High Jumps](/Actions.aspx?ID=2377), or [Long Jumps](/Actions.aspx?ID=2378), they can increase horizontal and vertical distances traveled by up to 10 feet. They also treat falls as 50 feet shorter. **Resonating Kick** ([Arcane](/Traits.aspx?ID=534)) The atrixyl makes a fist Strike. If the target is an [aberration](/Traits.aspx?ID=523) or is capable of casting spells from the [arcane](/Traits.aspx?ID=534) tradition, this attack deals an additional 2d12 force damage. **Roundhouse Smash** The atrixyl makes a fist Strike and compares the attack roll result to the AC of up to two foes, each of whom must be within the atrixyl's melee reach and adjacent to each other. Roll damage only once and apply it to each creature hit. This counts as two attacks for the atrixyl's multiple attack penalty.
Mysterious Antiheroes Atrixyls disguise themselves as humanoids to help avoid attention and gather information discreetly about [runewells](/Rules.aspx?ID=371). While many atrixyls remain aloof from society, some find themselves in the unlikely roles of antiheroes who protect those same humanoids from sinspawn and fleshwarpers alike.
name: Atrixyl
